_provenance.warning: DEV FIXTURE ONLY — the H/M/L tiers below are INVENTED for layout/dev preview. Real confidence cells must be derived from kernel output (DimensionResult computed confidences, packages/kernel/matrix_kernel/results.py) or from the per-dimension data-confidence map (data/READINESS.md) — never hand-assigned. Do not present this file as a MATRIX confidence assessment.
_provenance.purpose: Illustrates the confidence-heatmap data contract (Polygon or Point features with properties.confidence in H/M/L; see public/layers/README.md).
